chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الرَّاسِخِينَ فِي الْعِلْمِ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 22 – The Ones firmly rooted in knowledge, they<sup>asws</sup> are The Imams<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (436/ 2)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (436/ 2)
text: الرَّاسِخُونَ فِي الْعِلْمِ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَ الْأَئِمَّةُ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ ( عليهم السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad Bin Awrama, from Ali Bin Hassan, from Abdul Rahman Bin Kaseer,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘[3:7] and those who are firmly rooted in knowledge are Amir Al-Momineenasws and the Imamsasws from after himasws’.
en.sarwar: 3. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from MuAlia ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn ’Uwarma from Ali ibn Hassan from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn Kathir from abu ‘bdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “People well-grounded in Knowledge stands for Amir al-Mu’minin Ali (a.s.) and the Imams after him.”
